title: [spec-compliance] outdated Imax comment in trickle.py
description: python/src/lichen/rpl/trickle.py:14-18 references old spec appendix B.3 with Imax=20; current appendix-rpl.md and constants.toml use imax_doublings=8 for 2^20 ms ceiling. Comment must be updated to match current spec.
close_reason: Updated module docstring in trickle.py to reference current appendix-rpl.md, constants.toml imax_doublings=8 for 2^20 ms ceiling (replacing outdated appendix B.3/Imax=20 reference). Verified with git commit 5bdb9d8. Ruff not available in env; tests would pass as change is comment-only.
